examples.title: Algorithm: Insert at Beginning
examples.description: Insert a new node at the beginning of a linked list
examples.code:
ALGORITHM InsertAtBeginning
INPUT: head, data
OUTPUT: updated head

BEGIN
 newNode = CREATE_NODE(data)
 IF head IS NULL THEN
 head = newNode
 ELSE
 newNode->next = head
 head = newNode
 END IF
 RETURN head
END
examples.explanation: Create a new node with the given data and insert it at the beginning of the linked list. If the list is empty, set the new node as the head.
